reasoning: France has moved to clear favorite on the prediction markets at roughly 17-18% after Spain's flat 0-0 draw with Cape Verde, and Les Bleus backed it up with a convincing 3-1 win over Senegal that showed Mbappe in form and Saliba fit. Spain remains the most talented squad and only a marginal underdog, but the scoreless opener and lingering doubts over Yamal's fitness slightly dent confidence. Portugal, England, Argentina, Brazil and a ruthless 7-1 Germany are all live, so this race is wide open and confidence is low this early. Morocco is the standout dark horse: the 2022 semifinalists kept their core together under Regragui and, despite a tough Group C, profit from familiarity with North American conditions. Main threats to France are Spain's superior depth and the chaos of a 48-team bracket where altitude, travel and the expanded knockout path can derail any favorite.
